heading: Attendance at inactive-duty training assemblies: commercial travel at Federal supply schedule rates
label: 12603 Attendance at inactive-duty training assemblies: commercial travel at Federal supply schedule rates
notes: Amendments2002—Subsec. (d). substituted “” for “section 201(a) of the Federal Property and Administrative Services Act of 1949 ()”.Pub. L. 107–217section 501 of title 4040 U.S.C. 481(a)
amendments: Amendments2002—Subsec. (d). substituted “” for “section 201(a) of the Federal Property and Administrative Services Act of 1949 ()”.Pub. L. 107–217section 501 of title 4040 U.S.C. 481(a)

children.heading: .—Federal Supply Schedule Travel
children.label: a .—Federal Supply Schedule Travel
children.text: Commercial travel under Federal supply schedules is authorized for the travel of a Reserve to the location of inactive duty training to be performed by the Reserve and from that location upon completion of the training.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: b .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe in regulations such requirements, conditions, and restrictions for travel under the authority of subsection (a) as the Secretary considers appropriate. The regulations shall include policies and procedures for preventing abuses of that travel authority.

children.heading: .—Reimbursement Not Authorized
children.label: c .—Reimbursement Not Authorized
children.text: A Reserve is not entitled to Government reimbursement for the cost of travel authorized under subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Treatment of Transportation as Use by Military Departments
children.label: d .—Treatment of Transportation as Use by Military Departments
children.text: For the purposes of , travel authorized under subsection (a) shall be treated as transportation for the use of a military department.section 501 of title 40
